message:
✨ Attach existing tmux sessions + fix ANSI tab names (#36)

* 🐛 Fix ANSI escape codes in terminal tab names

Skip command tracking when input contains escape sequences (mouse
events, arrow keys, etc.) to prevent raw ANSI codes like
[<0;32;18M from appearing as tab names.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Attach existing tmux sessions from web UI

- Add attach() method to terminal-manager: spawns tmux attach-session
- Add listTmuxSessions() to enumerate available tmux sessions
- Add POST /api/terminals/attach and GET /api/tmux-sessions endpoints
- Add ActionMenu with LinkIcon in tab bar to pick and attach sessions
- Filter out already-attached sessions from the list

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
